title: melicope obtusifolia var. cuneifolia
intro: Melicope obtusifolia var. cuneifolia, also known as Kauila, is a species of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family native to Hawaii. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Kauila include reducing pain and inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and protecting against infections. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, often used in Hawaiian traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
